assumptions: Falsification is binary at configured thresholds for this pass.

conservation_hypothesis.hypothesis: Mechanistic cell integration preserves proxy invariants within configured tolerance.
conservation_hypothesis.pass_criteria: phase2.1 resolved experiment pass (tuned threshold + holdout BA >= 0.8 + observed metric crossing)
conservation_hypothesis.rejection_implications: Core mechanistic closure invalid; downstream claims demoted.

recovery_experiment.strategy: tune max_abs_drift threshold on calibration classes, validate on holdout, enforce conservative threshold cap

excitable_tissue_hypothesis.hypothesis: Multicellular dynamics produce excitable tissue regime.
excitable_tissue_hypothesis.observable_discriminant: active fraction and coherence in proto-neural tissue
excitable_tissue_hypothesis.pass_criteria: phase2.1 resolved experiment pass (tuned threshold + holdout BA >= 0.8 + observed metric crossing)

recovery_experiment.strategy: grid-search mechanistic parameters, tune active-fraction threshold on controls, validate holdout robustness

sensorimotor_emergence_hypothesis.hypothesis: Recurrent tissue dynamics form stimulus-responsive sensory-motor motifs.
sensorimotor_emergence_hypothesis.pass_criteria: phase2.1 resolved experiment pass (tuned threshold + holdout BA >= 0.8 + observed metric crossing)

recovery_experiment.strategy: grid-search circuit parameters, tune motif-gain threshold on controls, validate holdout robustness
